tagline: Turn dead time into custom micro-escapes.

designSystem.style: Dark glassmorphic UI with vibrant violet-cyan gradient accents, bold 800-weight headings, pill-shaped interactive elements, subtle glow shadows on CTAs, and a crisp monochromatic dark surface hierarchy

screens: Home — Mood selector, time picker, Generate CTA, and recent escapes carousel
Play — Interactive story experience with branching choices, progress bar, and completion summary
Discover (Feed) — Featured hero card, category filter pills, and 2-column scene grid
Profile — User stats, level progress, achievement badges, preferences list, and dark/light theme toggle
